title: viola × neglectiformis
intro: Viola × neglectiformis, also known as the hybrid pansy or heartsease, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Violaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Viola × neglectiformis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
